query:
-- Prima vediamo cosa c'è nel DB
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status, o.totalAmount, o.createdAt, u.email, u.name
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC;
